data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that existing bookings retain their original form requirements. However, the evidence does not confirm that the system maintains the historical context for bookings created before the update, as it only states that bookings from February use version 2 and those from March use version 3 without detailing how the system ensures that existing bookings are not affected by the new version. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence that existing bookings retain old form requirements after updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
